# Architect Trigger Keywords

## Skill Activation

- architect
- archon
- architecture design
- solution design
- design doc

## Deliverable Keywords

- SON/SRD route:
  - son, srd, requirements flow
- ADR route:
  - adr, architecture decision record, tradeoff
- AD2 route:
  - ad2, full architecture document
- Impact route:
  - impact analysis, change impact
- Story route:
  - story breakdown, implementation stories

## Guard Keywords (route away)

- tax, taxes, taxrule, taxcalculator -> tax skill
- ohip, dumboBroker, eventhandler, neweventtype -> ohip skill
- checklist, standards review, pr review -> reviewnet skill
- nomenclature, app id, synxisnom -> synxisnom skill
